title: Neznámý titulek
content: Kade Ruotolo is now preparing for his next professional MMA fight, as he will be facing Hiroyuki Tetsuka on ONE: The Inner Circle on May 15th, 2026. The event will be an exclusive night of elite fights from ONE Championship, with 5 blockbuster bouts booked across multiple disciplines. Ruotolo and Tetsuka are both exciting fighters too, so this matchup is almost guaranteed to deliver plenty of action for the fans. Although Tetsuka has the clear advantage in experience as a veteran fighter, Ruotolo has youth on his side and has already faced plenty of high-level challenges in his grappling career before moving to MMA. Tetsuka is 36 years old and has been an MMA fighter for almost a decade and a half now, starting his amateur career back in 2012. He went 3-2 before turning professional in 2015 and has since fought for both Pancrase and ONE Championship, amassing a solid 15-6 record with 13 finishes since then. Tetsuka has beaten many of the best fighters in Asia and he’s coming into this off the back of the biggest win of his career, a second-round TKO finish over the legendary Shinya Aoki. This has put him in a great position in the ONE lightweight rankings and a win over a rising star like Ruotolo might well earn him a title-shot. Ruotolo on the other hand is looking to extend his undefeated record even further, even though this is his most experienced opponent to date. He has already faced some very tough opposition in the ONE lightweight division and with 3 submission finishes in 3 fights, the promotion is looking at some of the best they have for him now. If Ruotolo can continue this run and end the night with a 4-0 record then it’s going to get very hard to deny him a title-shot. The only thing that might slow him down now is the fact that he’s also got a submission grappling world title to defend at the same time. ONE Championship announced the news that Kade Ruotolo will fight Hiroyuki Tetsuka on ONE: The Inner Circle in a recent post to their official Instagram account: Tags: Kade RuotoloONE Championship
